_comment: Edit these numbers and the website updates itself (the by-the-numbers stat and the support progress bar). 'raised' = total donations received so far, in US dollars. 'Left to raise' is figured automatically as goal minus raised. 'goalLengthFeet' = the total planned length of the Riverwalk, end to end. 'links.donate' = the URL the Donate button opens (e.g. your Community Foundation of NCW giving page).
